chin_hakha.function_grapher_keyboard_shortcuts_1_: Function grapher. Keyboard shortcut: 1 in 6 nih function phun a thim, D derivative, A area, T table, L cawn.
chin_hakha.where_the_function_crosses_the_x_axis_: Function nih x-axis a kalhnak hmun. Hi point hna ah, f(x) = 0. Root hmuh cu algebra le calculus ah a a biapi bik.
chin_hakha.where_the_function_crosses_the_y_axis_: Function nih y-axis a kalhnak hmun. Hi cu f(0) value a si — x = 0 lawng chiah.
chin_hakha.the_slope_tells_you_how_steep_the_func: Slope nih function cu point zeihmanh ah zeitluk in a tlei timi a chim. Tangent line nih curve kha point pakhat lawng ah a tawng. Zoh awkah trace slider hman!
chin_hakha.the_derivative_measures_the_rate_of_ch: Derivative nih thlennak rate a tah. Slope cu function tluan ah zeitin a thleng timi hmuh awkah hunter. f′(x) = 0 hmun ah, function nih local maximum asiloah minimum a ngei.
chin_hakha.the_shaded_area_represents_the_integra: Hlim a ngeimi hmun nih integral a langhter — f(x) i «pumhnak» dihlak. Vawlei taktak ah, hi cu hlatnak kalmi, energy hmanmi, asiloah probability a si khawh.
chin_hakha.when_a_0_the_parabola_opens_up_when_a_: a > 0 ah, parabola cu a cung ah a hung (⏣). a < 0 ah, a tang ah a hung (⏢). Vertex cu a letnak point a si. Zoh awkah 'a' thleng ceih!
chin_hakha.amplitude_a_controls_the_height_freque: Amplitude (a) nih sannak a uk, frequency (b) nih cycle zat a uk, phase shift (c) nih wave kha kaduh lei ah a kal. Period = 2π/b.
chin_hakha.cubic_with_inflection_at_origin: Origin ah inflection a ngeimi cubic
chin_hakha.true_or_false: 🧠 A hmaan maw a hmaan lo?
chin_hakha.using_simple_everyday_words_and_short_: nifate biafang fawi le ukungu tawi hman in, biafang har um lo in
chin_hakha.for_a_high_school_algebra_or_pre_calc_: high school algebra asiloah pre-calc siangngakchia caah, slope, intercept, vertex, period, le amplitude bantuk biafang he
chin_hakha.click_explain_for_the_ai_tutor_to_desc: «Fianter» click law AI tutor nih hi function kha na thlanmi reading level ah a chim.
chin_hakha.function_zoo_six_common_function_shape: Function zoo — function lim fommi paruk
chin_hakha.sliders_for_amplitude_frequency_phase_: Amplitude, frequency, phase caah slider. Discrete 5-state classification. Score a um lo, reveal a um lo.
chin_hakha.hypothesis_how_does_phase_shift_affect: Hypothesis: Phase shift nih a langmi wave zeitin a thabot?
chin_hakha.find_two_settings_that_produce_visuall: A langin aa lomi wave a chuahtermi setting pahnih hmuh.
chin_hakha.what_does_negative_amplitude_do: Negative amplitude nih zeidah a tuah?
chin_hakha.i_understand_explain_in_own_words: Ka hngalh — namah biafang in fianter
chin_hakha.explain_how_each_parameter_shapes_a_si: Parameter cio nih sine wave zeitin a lim a sak timi fianter.
chin_hakha.design_note_discrete_5_state_marker_no: Design note: discrete 5-state marker; wave score a um lo; reveal a um lo — design in a si.
